title: Gates Widened, Medical Triage Centres With Beds And Doctors At Chinnaswamy Stadium To Deal With Emergency
description: The security arrangements attained utmost significance at the M. Chinnaswamy stadium over stampede at the stadium on June 4, 2025 when a large congregation of people made desperate attempts to gain entry into the stadium to watch felicitation to RCB players on their win in IPL-2025 final.
